requirement_topic.en: Heat-pump-specific MEPS — Evolving Indian Policy Watch Item
requirement_topic.zh: 热泵专门MEPS——印度政策演进关注项
requirement_topic.zht: 熱泵專門MEPS——印度政策演進關注項

summary.en: India has mature BEE star labelling for some air-conditioner categories, but dedicated air-source heat-pump MEPS for space heating or domestic hot water should be treated as evolving. Exporters should not assume that Chinese COP, APF, or low-ambient heating data satisfies future Indian heat-pump-specific thresholds. Each model should be mapped to the current BEE product list and any draft or notified schedule at the time of import.
summary.zh: 印度对部分空调类别已有成熟的BEE星级标签，但针对空间供暖或生活热水的专用空气源热泵MEPS应视为仍在演进。出口商不应假设中国COP、APF或低环境温度制热数据满足未来印度热泵专门门槛。每个型号在进口时都应映射到当前BEE产品清单以及任何草案或已通知目录。
summary.zht: 印度對部分空調類別已有成熟的BEE星級標籤，但針對空間供暖或生活熱水的專用空氣源熱泵MEPS應視為仍在演進。出口商不應假設中國COP、APF或低環境溫度制熱資料滿足未來印度熱泵專門門檻。每個型號在進口時都應映射到目前BEE產品清單以及任何草案或已通知目錄。

standards_or_laws: BEE product schedules and notifications for covered appliances

summary.en: China uses GB 21455 for certain air conditioners and GB/T 25127 for low-ambient-temperature air-source heat pumps. These may provide engineering data, but Chinese seasonal or rated efficiency metrics do not automatically map to Indian BEE categories or future heat-pump-specific MEPS.
summary.zh: 中国对部分空调器使用GB 21455，对低环境温度空气源热泵使用GB/T 25127。这些可提供工程数据，但中国季节性或额定能效指标不会自动映射到印度BEE类别或未来热泵专门MEPS。
summary.zht: 中國對部分空調器使用GB 21455，對低環境溫度空氣源熱泵使用GB/T 25127。這些可提供工程資料，但中國季節性或額定能效指標不會自動映射到印度BEE類別或未來熱泵專門MEPS。

gap.en: The present India gap is uncertainty and category mapping: AC-mode products may already need BEE star registration, while dedicated heating or hot-water heat pumps should be tracked for emerging MEPS and labelling schedules. Compliance files should preserve raw test data so Indian conversion or re-testing can be done quickly.
gap.zh: 当前印度差距在于不确定性和类别映射：空调模式产品可能已经需要BEE星级注册，而专用供暖或热水热泵应跟踪新出现的MEPS和标签目录。合规文件应保留原始测试数据，以便快速进行印度换算或重新测试。
gap.zht: 目前印度差距在於不確定性和類別映射：空調模式產品可能已經需要BEE星級註冊，而專用供暖或熱水熱泵應追蹤新出現的MEPS和標籤目錄。合規文件應保留原始測試資料，以便快速進行印度換算或重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation only when a BEE category, schedule, or notification covers the product; standards and test methods are voluntary conformity routes unless incorporated into that binding category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only where Chinese energy-efficiency rules cover the product category

source.publisher: Bureau of Energy Efficiency, Ministry of Power, Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: Watch item — India heat-pump-specific MEPS are evolving; do not rely on Chinese efficiency metrics without current BEE category mapping.
compliance_verdict.zh: 关注项——印度热泵专门MEPS仍在演进；未进行当前BEE类别映射前，不应依赖中国能效指标。
compliance_verdict.zht: 關注項——印度熱泵專門MEPS仍在演進；未進行目前BEE類別映射前，不應依賴中國能效指標。
